description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. Play up this classic style with monochrome ensembles and a matching belt or scarf. Height: 30 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 12 cm Made of textured leatherette with a metallic brand badge on the front and a metal and crystal embellishment Two leatherette shoulder handles Two main roomy compartments with a mobile pouch and a zippered pocket in the first compartment A magnetic buttoned pocket before the main compartments One zippered pocket at the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
